abstract.text: A control that provides a horizontal bar with tabs.

inlineContent.text: A control that provides a horizontal bar with tabs. Similar to
but is only in charge of drawing tabs, not interacting with children.
This object emits the following signals:

abstract.text: If
, the tab offset will be changed to keep the currently selected tab visible.
Sets the maximum allowed width of the icon for the tab at index
. This limit is applied on top of the default size of the icon and on top of [theme_item icon_max_width]. The height is adjusted according to the icon’s ratio.
